title: Update a Deployment Without Downtime — Detecting a stalled rollout
text:
If a rollout does not make progress within the time specified by
.spec.progressDeadlineSeconds
(default: 600 seconds), Kubernetes marks the Deployment condition
Progressing
as
False
. You can check for this condition by describing the Deployment:
kubectl describe deployment nginx-deployment
Look for the
Progressing
condition in the
Conditions
section of the output. A stalled rollout usually indicates that new Pods are failing to start. The
Events
section of the output can help diagnose the issue.
